full_prompt: Design a single-part monolithic main landing gear for a piston-powered radio-controlled aero-design competition aircraft. Gross Take-Off Weight (GTOW) is capped at 55 lb (24.95 kg), and the aircraft must complete a 200 ft (61 m) take-off and a 400 ft (122 m) landing. The landing gear is a single bowed 'A-frame' spring with two wheel mounts, root-bolted to the fuselage belly via four M6 bolts on a 100 mm x 60 mm rectangular pattern. Geometric constraints: gear track (wheel centerline to wheel centerline) 450 mm; gear height (ground to mounting flange) 180 mm; cross section of the spring arm 25 mm wide x 6 mm thick (flat spring). Material: 7075-T6 aluminum plate, E = 71.7 GPa, yield = 503 MPa, ultimate = 572 MPa, density = 2810 kg/m^3. Load cases: (R1) Static ground load at GTOW: aircraft weight 24.95 kg x 9.81 = 245 N distributed 50/50 to each wheel = 122 N per wheel acting vertically; max von Mises in spring arm <= yield / 1.5 = 335 MPa. (R2) Hard-landing dynamic impact: sink rate 3.0 m/s at touch-down with GTOW, treated as a 3 g vertical impact => total 3 x 245 N = 735 N, 367 N per wheel; max von Mises <= ultimate / 1.5 = 381 MPa. (R3) Side load during crosswind landing: 0.5 g lateral = 122 N on one wheel while supporting 2 g vertical = 245 N on same wheel; combined bending + torsion; max von Mises <= yield / 1.5 = 335 MPa. (R4) Mass of gear <= 180 g. (R5) Elastic deflection at wheel centerline under R2 shall be <= 40 mm (so gear does not bottom against fuselage). Primary verification: structural FEA (linear static for R1, R2, R3). Vibration, thermal, fluid, radiation, buckling explicitly NOT required at this gate. Deliverables: STEP AP242, material certificate, and a report listing gear mass in g, max von Mises per load case in MPa, max wheel deflection under hard landing in mm.
short_prompt:
Design a single-part monolithic flat-spring 'A-frame' main landing gear for a piston-powered radio-controlled aero-design competition aircraft (GTOW capped at 55 lb / 24.95 kg, 200 ft take-off / 400 ft landing requirement). The gear is a 7075-T6 aluminum spring, 25 x 6 mm cross section, root-bolted to the fuselage belly via four M6 bolts on a 100 x 60 mm rectangular pattern; wheel track 450 mm, gear height 180 mm.

Load cases.
- LC1 static ground load at GTOW: 122 N per wheel vertically.
- LC2 hard-landing dynamic impact: 3 g vertical at GTOW sink rate 3.0 m/s, 367 N per wheel; wheel-centerline deflection <= 40 mm to avoid fuselage bottoming.
- LC3 crosswind side load: 0.5 g lateral (122 N) on one wheel while carrying 2 g vertical (245 N), combined bending + torsion.

prompt.title: RC aero-design main landing gear (55 lb GTOW class)
prompt.brief: 7075-T6 bowed 'A-frame' gear for 55 lb GTOW RC aero-design aircraft. Three static load cases + deflection limit.

boundary_conditions.mounting: four M6 bolt holes fully fixed

exclusions_explained.buckling_analysis: Slender flat spring, but not critical under specified loads.
